other_findings: Eosinophil-basophil-mast cell progenitor cluster in fetal skin
Downstream of GMP in the myeloid differentiation hierarchy
MEMPs (megakaryocyte-erythroid-mast cell progenitors) identified in fetal skin by Popescu et al. 2019

evidence_quotes.quote: The presence of megakaryocyte-erythrocyte-mast cell progenitors (MEMPs), lymphocyte precursors, B-cell progenitors, ILC precursors and their progeny 41 indicates differentiation of these lineages may be supported within developing dermis.
evidence_quotes.context: MEMPs and other progenitors in fetal dermis

evidence_quotes.quote: Mast cells have been detected in fetal skin as early as 8 PCW, 41 and continue to mature and expand throughout the second trimester.
evidence_quotes.context: Mast cell presence in fetal skin from 8 PCW
